ksa_text: Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issues through application code, database queries, network connectivity, and infrastructure configuration to identify root causes.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-012 (TF, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4156 is insufficient to establish relevance to clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.416, eu_ai_act=0.407, nice=0.404) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4156 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does TF-domain KSA TF-S-012 (composite 0.4156) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4156 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Clinical Data Manager at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.4156 is not a standard requirement for Clinical Data Manager at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4156, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
